case_title: NORDLING GORDON K. VS SCHOEN VICKI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOEN VICKI
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF OCT-27-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY SCHOEN VICKI AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NORDLING GORDON K. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORDLING GORDON K. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCHOEN VICKI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-28-1992, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO NOV-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SCHOEN VICKI RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT NORDLING GORDON K. $2,050.01 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,065.01, DEF NORDLING APPEARED AT THE TRIAL OF THIS MATTER & PRESENTED NO OBJECTION THAT HE HAD BEEN SERVED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF NORDLING GORDON K.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY NORDLING GORDON K. AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOEN VICKI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO PLAINTIFF NORDLING GORDON K.
